steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The underlined sentence uses 'While' to set up a direct contrast: horizontal gene transfer is common in prokaryotes but has rarely been observed in eukaryotes.

steps.title: Match the contrast to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice B correctly identifies the function: the sentence contrasts the frequency with which horizontal gene transfer has been detected in two categories of organisms (prokaryotes show common occurrence; eukaryotes show rare occurrence). The other choices either focus on distinguishing mechanics between different processes, treat the sentence as explaining why a perception is flawed, or claim it argues for similarity—none of which applies here. That matches choice B — B is correct.
